chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3857 of 2024 C.P. No. D-3858 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge C.P. No. D-3857 of 2024 Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No. 16828/2024 2. For hearing of main case C.P. No. D-3858 of 2024 Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No. 16841/2024 2. For hearing of main case 07-02-2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiqui for the Petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel provisional release has been sanctioned herein, however, the matter has already seized of by this Court in respect of reference applications. Learned counsel states that these petitions may be disposed of, however, the fate of the amount secured be subject to commencerating references. Learned counsel for the department articulated no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed in above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad PS
